headlines.title: The Promise and Peril of Jamaica’s Offshore Oil Ambitions
headlines.summary: Jamaica may be following in the footsteps of its Caribbean neighbours, such as Guyana, as it plans to drill for oil, despite being highly vulnerable to climate change. headlines.title: UK Sets January 2027 Deadline for Ban on Fuel Made From Russian Crude
headlines.summary: The UK has finally put a date on the sanctions loophole it said it would close a while ago.
